_schema._comment: Weaver Tree — Season 4+ progression. Scaffolded empty (CSV 0L-1); node graph populated after user captures ground-truth data from the in-game Weaver Tree UI. No placeholder values: the ``nodes`` list stays empty until every entry carries verified content.

id.notes: Stable ID used for allocation + connection graph. Prefer LET-style short IDs when captured.

raw_node_id.notes: Numeric ID from the source payload, if available

node_type.notes: Enum pending user confirmation; examples to verify in-game: ``minor``, ``major``, ``keystone``, ``webway``

tier.notes: Gating tier if Weaver Tree uses tiered unlocks; user to confirm whether this exists

max_points.notes: Maximum points allocatable to this node

connections.notes: IDs of directly connected neighbour nodes

stats.notes: Same shape as passives.json — ``value`` is the tooltip string (e.g. ``+10%``, ``+1``)

ability_granted.notes: If the node unlocks an ability rather than a stat

capture_checklist: Open the Weaver Tree in-game at a character with >= 1 point spent.
For every node: record id/name/description/node_type, (x,y) position, max_points, connections, stats list, icon if visible.
Alternatively: DevTools -> Network on a LET planner with a Weaver Tree build, capture the node graph JSON, and paste it here for normalisation.
